rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees On Appeal
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 18, 2021 line 1. DEFENDANT CORY LAU'S Motion For An Award Of Reasonable Attorneys Fees On Appeal is GRANTED in the amount of $9,192.50, which represents reasonable amount of fees as to hours and hourly rates. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN SHIMAMOTO VS. PAULA OGI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 18, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANTS PAULA OGI, ITF 2, A PARTNERSHIP, PAULA OGI, STACEY SHIMAMOTO, STACEY SHIMAMOTO (INCORRECTLY SUED AS STACY, and ITF, A PARTNERSHIP's DEMURRER to COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts in support of each element of each cause of action with requisite particularity. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN SHIMAMOTO VS. PAULA OGI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Defendants To Strike Statements From Plaintiff?S Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 18, 2021 line 2. DEFENDANTS PAULA OGI, ITF 2, A PARTNERSHIP, PAULA OGI, STACEY SHIMAMOTO, STACEY SHIMAMOTO (INCORRECTLY SUED AS STACY, and ITF, A PARTNERSHIP'S Motion Of Defendants To Strike Statements From Plaintiff's Complaint is GRANTED with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts in support of the claim for punitive damages. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHEN SHIMAMOTO VS. PAULA OGI ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 18, 2021 line 2. CROSS DEFENDANT STEPHEN SHIMAMOTO's DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is sustained with leave to amend as to causes of action for conversion and negligent misrepresentation for plaintiff to allege in clear and concise language facts in support of each element of each cause of action by each Plaintiff asserting the claims against each defendant. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: 2490 CHESTNUT STREET, LLC VS. SOFIA PALUMBO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 18, 2021 line 7. DEFENDANT SOFIA PALUMBO'S DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is sustained in part. The action is stayed until March 31, 2021. No earlier than April 1, 2021 Plaintiff shall file and serve an amended complaint properly filling out paragraphs 2 and 8 of the Form Complaint (Plaintiff may file a non-form complaint containing all necessary allegations). =(501/CFH)
